pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'General Chemistry (CHEM101)', setup_task.sh creates course with shortname='CHEM101' and fullname='General Chemistry', export_result.sh verifies course by shortname='CHEM101'
Task description explicitly states 'Create a site-level cohort named "Biology Majors Fall 2025"', verifier.py uses same default value
Task description explicitly states 'with ID number "BIOMAJ-F25"', setup_task.sh and export_result.sh both query/verify by this ID

Task description explicitly lists 'Jane Smith (jsmith), Michael Jones (mjones), Alice Wilson (awilson), and Bob Brown (bbrown)'. These users are created in setup_moodle.sh with matching usernames and full names. verifier.py uses same member list as default

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Moodle cohort named 'Biology Majors Fall 2025' with ID number 'BIOMAJ-F25', adding four students: jsmith (Jane Smith), mjones (Michael Jones), awilson (Alice Wilson), and bbrown (Bob Brown). The cohort sync enrollment method is configured for the 'General Chemistry' course (CHEM101) to automatically enroll cohort members as Students. All data is synthetically generated during environment setup with Moodle 4.x running on MariaDB.
